SubCategory_Description: All varieties of whole grain rice including basmati, sona masoori, ponni, and matta, plus rice-based products such as rice flour, rice flakes, pawa, and idly rice.
Dried legumes and pulses including toor dal, moong dal, urid dal, chana dal, red lentils, brown lentils, chickpeas, kidney beans, black-eye beans, and other dried beans and peas.
Ground and blended spice powders and masala mixes including chilli powder, turmeric, coriander, cumin, garam masala, curry powder, tandoori masala, and brand-specific spice blends.
Milling products used for baking and cooking including wheat flour, chapatti flour, self-raising flour, corn flour, semolina, rava, bulgur wheat, couscous, and other grain flours.
Unground whole spices and dried herbs including cardamom, cloves, cinnamon, bay leaves, mustard seeds, cumin seeds, dried oregano, thyme, rosemary, parsley, lemongrass, and zaatar.
Culinary fats and oils used for frying, roasting, and cooking including sunflower oil, vegetable oil, coconut oil, mustard oil, sesame oil, olive oil, and clarified butter (ghee).
Packaged nuts, dried fruits, and seeds including almonds, cashews, pistachios, walnuts, peanuts, raisins, dates, figs, apricots, desiccated coconut, and mixed nuts.
Sweetening ingredients including white sugar, brown sugar, caster sugar, icing sugar, jaggery, palm sugar, sugarcane products, and artificial sweeteners used in cooking and baking.
Essential cooking and baking staples including table salt, rock salt, black salt, malt vinegar, white vinegar, baking powder, baking soda, yeast, food colouring, and essence extracts.
Traditional and contemporary savoury snacks including namkeen, bhujia, murukku, chakli, patra, dhokla, golcappa, popcorn, and other ready-to-eat Indian and ethnic snack foods.
Baked sweet and savoury biscuits, cookies, crackers, rusks, wafers, and similar dry baked snack products. Includes tea biscuits, digestives, Marie, and shortbread varieties.
Chocolate bars, chocolate confectionery, boiled sweets, lollipops, toffees, chewing gum, mints, and other sugar-based candy products from mainstream and ethnic brands.
Traditional South Asian and Indian sweet confections including gulab jamun, rasgulla, rassomalai, jalebi, ladoo, barfi, chum chum, halwa, and other festive and everyday Indian sweets.
Potato crisps, tortilla chips, flavoured corn snacks, and western-style savoury snack products including Doritos, Pringles, Walkers, and similar branded crisp and snack ranges.
Loose leaf and bagged teas including black tea, green tea, masala chai, and herbal infusions such as camomile, peppermint, hibiscus, and other caffeine-free herbal tea blends.
Ground coffee, instant coffee granules, espresso, and coffee-based hot drink products. Includes filter coffee, chicory blends, and branded instant coffee varieties.
Carbonated and non-carbonated cold drinks including cola, lemonade, energy drinks, sports drinks, flavoured sodas, and ethnic soft drink brands such as Thums Up, Limca, and Fanta.
Packaged fruit juices, nectars, fruit drinks, and juice-based beverages including Rubicon, Tropical Sun, Alizas, mango nectar, amla juice, and similar fruit-based drink products.
Nutritional and malt-based drinks including Horlicks, Bournvita, Ovaltine, Supermalt, plant-based milks such as almond milk, oat milk, and other fortified health drink products.
Drink syrups, squashes, cordials, and concentrates designed for dilution including Rooh Afza, rose syrup, faluda sherbet, lime cordial, fruit concentrates, and flavoured drink bases.
Still and sparkling bottled water, coconut water, and flavoured water drinks. Includes mineral water, spring water, Volvic, and packaged coconut water products.
Root and bulb vegetables including potatoes, sweet potatoes, onions, garlic, ginger, carrots, beetroot, radish, turnip, parsnip, and other underground vegetables sold fresh.
Fresh leafy vegetables and culinary herbs including spinach, coriander, curry leaves, mint, basil, fenugreek, watercress, spring onions, kale, cabbage, and other fresh green leaves.
Fresh above-ground vegetables including tomatoes, cucumbers, courgettes, peppers, green beans, peas, sweetcorn, okra, aubergine, butternut squash, and other pod and gourd vegetables.
Unusual, tropical, and culturally specific fresh produce including plantain, yucca, breadfruit, bitter gourd, drumstick, karela, chillies, fresh dates, nectarines, mangosteen, and other exotic items.
Frozen raw and processed meat and poultry products including chicken, beef, lamb, goat, mutton, minced meat, and other halal and non-halal frozen meat cuts and portions.
Frozen whole fish, fish fillets, prawns, shrimp, and other frozen seafood products. Includes both fresh-frozen and processed frozen fish and seafood varieties.
Convenience meal products requiring minimal preparation including marinated meats, ready-to-cook kits, curry express packs, biryani mixes, and partially prepared chilled or ambient meal bases.
Preserved vegetables and fruit condiments including mango pickle, lime pickle, garlic pickle, onion pickle, mixed pickle, chutney varieties, and other fermented or oil-preserved accompaniments.
Bottled sauces used for cooking or as condiments including ketchup, curry sauces, pasta sauces, soy sauce, fish sauce, oyster sauce, hot sauce, and ready-made cooking sauce products.
Concentrated cooking ingredients in paste or puree form including garlic paste, ginger paste, tamarind paste, tomato puree, chilli paste, and other blended cooking base ingredients.
Sweet spreads and preserves including honey, fruit jams, marmalades, lemon curd, nut butters, tahini, date syrup, and other bread spreads and sweet preserve products.
Cooking acids and essential flavouring liquids including malt vinegar, white vinegar, apple cider vinegar, rice vinegar, lemon juice, tamarind water, and other acidic cooking staples.
Shelf-stable dairy products including full cream milk powder, skimmed milk powder, sweetened condensed milk, evaporated milk, and other dehydrated or concentrated milk products.
Fresh and processed dairy products including paneer, cheddar cheese, processed cheese slices, butter, cream, yoghurt, lassi, kulfi, and other chilled dairy food items.
Fresh hen eggs and other egg products sold as chilled produce. Includes free-range, barn, and standard eggs in various pack sizes for retail and catering supply.
Daily personal hygiene and grooming products including bar soap, body wash, shower gel, toothpaste, toothbrush, deodorant, antiperspirant, shaving products, perfume, and nail products.
Products for hair cleansing, conditioning, and styling including shampoo, conditioner, hair oil, hair serum, hair cream, hair dye, hair masks, and treatment products for all hair types.
Facial and body skin care and makeup products including moisturisers, face creams, lotions, sunscreen, foundation, lipstick, eye products, and other cosmetic and beauty items.
Products for cleaning the home and kitchen including washing-up liquid, bleach, surface sprays, floor cleaners, sponges, scrubbers, dishwasher products, incense sticks, and general household tools.
Clothes washing and fabric care products including laundry detergent, washing powder, fabric softener, stain remover, and other products used for machine or hand washing garments.
Single-use and reusable packaging products for catering and food service including foil containers, cling film, food bags, cling wrap, baking paper, paper plates, cups, and cutlery.
Over-the-counter health products and herbal remedies including pain relief, cold and flu treatments, medicated balms, herbal supplement tablets, ayurvedic products, and health supplements.
Baked bread and pastry products including white bread, brown bread, roti, parotta, naan, pitta, wraps, croissants, and other packaged bakery items sold at ambient temperature.
Instant noodles, ramen, rice noodles, glass noodles, egg noodles, and other quick-cook noodle products. Includes instant meal kits and flavoured noodle pack products.
Dried pasta shapes including spaghetti, penne, fusilli, macaroni, tagliatelle, couscous, and other Italian and international pasta varieties used in cooking.
Breakfast grain products including rolled oats, porridge oats, cornflakes, muesli, granola, and other ready-to-eat or quick-cook morning cereal products.
Preserved foods in tins and cans including canned vegetables, tinned fruits, baked beans, canned fish, canned pulses, tinned tomatoes, jackfruit, sarson ka saag, and other canned products.
